title: hieracium pyrenaicum subsp. perclusum
intro: Hieracium pyrenaicum subsp. perclusum is a lesser-known species of the Hieracium genus, commonly referred to as hawkweed, which is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. The plant is known to have medicinal properties, particularly in its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can help soothe wounds and infections. The health benefits of Hieracium pyrenaicum subsp. perclusum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as a natural remedy for various skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
